title: Red Police
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Citation}}
The '''Red Police''' were a militia on [[Prakith/Legends|Prakith]], during the reign of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]]-turned-[[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Foga Brill/Legends|Foga Brill]].

Their duties included providing security for the families of Prakith citizens conscripted into the [[Grand Imperial Navy]]. They may also have been responsible for the mass executions of homeless vagrants that were said to occur in some of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] urban areas.

They may have been established by the warlord as he reorganized [[Grand Imperial Navy|his sector group]] to strengthen his power, or they may have had earlier origins during the time when Prakith was a loyal [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress world]].

{{Military-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Red Police may have been intended as a reference to the red-[[Armor/Legends|armored]] [[Coruscant Guard/Legends|Coruscant Guards]] created for the ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'' multimedia event, which appeared in the same year as ''[[Shield of Lies]]'', and which are said to have served on a number of [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
